'''Rhinnal''' was the primary of the [[Rhinnal system/Legends|Rhinnal system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by seven [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].<ref name="Core Worlds" />

{{Star-stub}}
